SPIRE1REVAMPED-BRUTALITY_POWER.descripti: Whenever you lose HP, draw 1 additional card at the start of your next turn.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-BRUTALITY_POWER.smartDesc: Whenever you lose HP, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional {Amount:plural:card|cards} at the start of your next turn.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-BRUTALITY_POWER.title: Brutality
SPIRE1REVAMPED-DISARM_POWER.description: Whenever you lose HP on your turn, ALL enemies lose 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-DISARM_POWER.smartDescrip: Whenever you lose HP on your turn, ALL enemies lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-DISARM_POWER.title: Disarm
